data.title: Trump Prosecutor Fani Willis Removed From Election Case, Indictment Stands
data.description: Georgia court removes Fani Willis from Trump election interference case due to concerns of impartiality. Indictment remains intact.

data.title: P/E Ratio Insights for Verisk Analytics
What's Going On With Applied Materials (AMAT) Stock?
data.description: Applied Materials shares are trading lower by 2.1% during Wednesday's session. The stock is falling amid the Federal Reserve's cautious pivot on interest rate policy, alongside Micron's disappointing Q2 guidance.

data.title: Roche-Prothena Partnered Mid-Stage Parkinson's Trial Misses Primary Endpoint, But Cling On Signs Of Clinical Benefits
data.description: Prothena and Roche report Phase 2b PADOVA results on prasinezumab in Parkinson's, showing promising trends and nominal significance in key analyses.

data.title: Oklo Business Model Supports Recurring Revenues, AI Revolution Creates Elevated Demand
data.description: Oklo's business model supports recurring revenues. The company aims to develop its first SMR by 2027. Analyst initiates with Outperform.
